input_contract: Consumes approved outputs from `RV32-L4_STRUCTURE-001` (`layer_L4_structure/specs/04_structural_spec.md`), plus verification intent `RV32-L4_STRUCTURE-TP-001` (`layer_L4_structure/specs/04_structural_test_plan.md`) and latest evidence `RV32-L4_STRUCTURE-TR-001` (`layer_L4_structure/specs/04_structural_test_report.md`).

test_cases.name: test_dsl_declares_low_power_and_muldiv_state
test_cases.objective: Validate dsl declares low power and muldiv state.

test_cases.name: test_dsl_declares_required_external_ports
test_cases.objective: Validate dsl declares required external ports.
